evals.prompt: I need a launch video for TikTok for my app Quotient — it lets freelance web designers generate project quotes from a client call recording. Launching next week, goal is free trial signups.
evals.expected_output: A positioning snapshot, 3 launch angles with one recommended for TikTok, a timecoded 15-30s script (hook/body/CTA), an AI video generation prompt with 9:16 aspect ratio and style notes, caption + posting copy, and 10 opening hooks.
assertions: Three distinct launch angles are compared with one recommended for the TikTok context
The script is timecoded and fits 15-30 seconds with a hook in the first 3 seconds
An AI generation prompt is included following subject+action+scene+camera+style structure
9:16 aspect ratio is specified for TikTok
Exactly 10 opening hooks are provided using varied hook types
Caption copy with a CTA is included

evals.prompt: make me a 60 second product hunt launch video script for my API monitoring tool. developers are the audience. we alert on latency spikes before customers notice.
evals.expected_output: A 30-60s Product Hunt script adapted for a developer audience (demo-first angle likely), timecoded, showing the product working, with a 16:9 generation prompt and PH-appropriate posting copy.
assertions: The script is timecoded and fits within 60 seconds
The tone and content are developer-appropriate (concrete, demo-led, no marketing fluff)
The core value (alert before customers notice) appears in the hook or early body
A 16:9 or PH-appropriate aspect ratio is specified
